allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5050 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, Path })

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); l=d['learning']; print\('summary words:', len\(l['summary'].split\(\)\)\); print\('flashcards:', len\(l['flashcards']\)\); print\('quiz:', len\(l['quiz']\)\); print\(\); print\(l['summary'][:300]\)")

PowerShell($ports = @\(5173, 5174, 5175\); foreach \($p in $ports\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "$p : PID $\($c.OwningProcess\) / $\($proc.ProcessName\)" } else { Write-Output "$p : free" } })
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('chats key present:', 'chats' in d\); print\('chats count:', len\(d.get\('chats', []\)\)\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5050/api/sources/3/ask -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"question":"In one sentence, what was the single biggest factor in landing GSoC?"}')
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d.get\('chat',{}\); print\('Q:', c.get\('question'\)\); print\('A:', c.get\('answer','\(error: '+str\(d\)+'\)'\)[:300]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ch=d['chats'][0] if d['chats'] else {}; print\('chat keys:', list\(ch.keys\(\)\)\); print\('starred field:', ch.get\('starred', 'MISSING'\)\); fc=d.get\('learning',{}\).get\('flashcards'\); print\('flashcards shape:', type\(fc\).__name__, '/ keys:', list\(fc.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(fc, dict\) else 'N/A'\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\('- ' + t for t in d.get\('topics', []\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); fc=d['learning']['flashcards']; print\('topic:', fc['topic']\); print\('card count:', len\(fc['cards']\)\); print\('first Q:', fc['cards'][0]['q']\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d['source']; print\('flashcard_topics:', s.get\('flashcard_topics'\)\); print\('repurpose_angles:', s.get\('repurpose_angles'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d.get\('source',{}\); fc=d.get\('learning',{}\).get\('flashcards',{}\); print\('learning.flashcards.topic:', fc.get\('topic'\)\); print\('learning.flashcards card count:', len\(fc.get\('cards', []\)\)\); print\(\); print\('source.flashcard_topics:'\); [print\('  -', t\) for t in \(s.get\('flashcard_topics'\) or []\)]; print\(\); print\('source.repurpose_angles:'\); [print\('  -', a\) for a in \(s.get\('repurpose_angles'\) or []\)]")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5051/api/sources/3/ask -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"question":"In one short sentence, what is this video about?"}' -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n")
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:5051/api/sources/3/ask -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"question":"What is this video about, in one sentence?"}')

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5051 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400 }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5051 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d['sources'][0]; print\('keys:', sorted\(s.keys\(\)\)\); print\(\); print\('word_count:', s.get\('word_count'\)\); print\('has_learning:', s.get\('has_learning'\)\); print\('chat_count:', s.get\('chat_count'\)\); print\('starred_chat_count:', s.get\('starred_chat_count'\)\); print\('repurpose_count:', s.get\('repurpose_count'\)\); print\(\); print\('summary first 100 chars:', \(s.get\('summary_excerpt'\) or ''\)[:100]\)")

Bash(timeout 3 node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({ path: require\('path'\).join\(__dirname, '..', '.env'\) }\); console.log\('RESEND set?', !!process.env.RESEND_API_KEY, 'starts with:', \(process.env.RESEND_API_KEY||''\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('MAIL_FROM:', process.env.MAIL_FROM\);")
